jcr:content.infoTooltip: Trusted by over 500 companies worldwide, including Fortune 500 organizations across multiple industries.

hero.title: Transform Your Digital Presence
hero.subtitle: We build experiences that drive growth
hero.description: Nexus Digital is a full-service digital experience agency. We help brands create meaningful connections with their audiences through innovative design, cutting-edge technology, and data-driven strategies.

item0.title: UI/UX Design
item0.description: We create intuitive, user-centered designs that delight users and drive engagement across all digital touchpoints.

item1.title: Web Development
item1.description: From React SPAs to AEM-powered sites, we build fast, scalable, and maintainable web applications using modern tech stacks.

item2.title: Digital Strategy
item2.description: Data-driven strategies that align your business goals with user needs, ensuring measurable results and sustainable growth.

item3.title: Cloud & DevOps
item3.description: End-to-end cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and AEM managed services to keep your digital experience running smoothly.

item4.title: Content Strategy
item4.description: Compelling content that tells your brand story, optimized for SEO and personalized across every customer touchpoint.

item5.title: Analytics & Optimization
item5.description: Measure, analyze, and optimize your digital experiences with actionable insights and A/B testing at scale.

whysection.heading: Why Nexus Digital?
whysection.body:
We combine creative design with technical excellence to deliver digital experiences that drive measurable results. Our team of strategists, designers, and engineers work collaboratively to transform complex challenges into elegant solutions.

From startups to enterprise, we have helped hundreds of organizations establish and scale their digital presence with confidence.
whysection.approachDescription: Every project begins with deep research and strategic thinking. We believe in data-driven design decisions and iterative development that puts your users first.

teaser.title: Ready to Transform Your Digital Experience?
teaser.description: Join hundreds of companies that trust Nexus Digital to build, scale, and optimize their digital presence. Let's create something extraordinary together.

testimonial.quote: Nexus Digital transformed our online presence completely. The team's expertise and dedication exceeded our expectations.
testimonial.author: Sarah Chen

item0.title: What services does Nexus Digital offer?
item0.content: We offer a comprehensive range of digital services including UI/UX design, web development, digital strategy, cloud & DevOps, content strategy, and analytics & optimization. Our team of 50+ specialists works across industries to deliver end-to-end digital experiences.

item1.title: How long does a typical project take?
item1.content: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A typical website redesign takes 8-16 weeks from discovery to launch. Larger transformation projects can take 3-6 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation.

item2.title: Do you work with AEM projects?
item2.content: Yes! We are AEM specialists. Our team has extensive experience with Adobe Experience Manager including AEM as a Cloud Service, content fragment models, headless implementations, Universal Editor integration, and custom component development. We can help with everything from migration to full-scale implementation.

item3.title: What is your pricing model?
item3.content: We offer flexible pricing models including project-based fixed pricing, time & materials, and dedicated team engagement. Contact us for a customized proposal based on your specific requirements and budget.
